findings.title: Producer-only: frontmatter_warnings written to ledger with no consumer
findings.description: set_skill_loaded() writes frontmatter_warnings to ledger via append_event() but no hook reads it back to surface to users. Data written but permanently inaccessible at read time.

evidence.code_excerpt: line 387: frontmatter_warnings written, no consumer found in src/ or hooks/
evidence.proof: Grep across src/ and .claude/hooks/ shows only producer and tests.

impact.business_consequence: Advisory warnings permanently invisible. Skills ship with missing required fields.

recommendation.action: Add consumer hook that reads frontmatter_warnings from ledger and surfaces to user.

findings.title: Path mismatch: _validate_skill_frontmatter reads wrong path
findings.description: _validate_skill_frontmatter() reads STATE_DIR/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md not P:/.claude/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md. STATE_DIR = P:/.claude/state.

evidence.code_excerpt: line 241: STATE_DIR / skills / skill_name. line 186: Path(P:/.claude/skills) / skill_name

impact.business_consequence: Validation fails for most skills. Empty warnings returned for skills with missing fields.

findings.title: Early-return gate suppresses frontmatter_warnings
findings.description: Lines 358-365 gate on frontmatter_warnings. Skills with warnings but empty frontmatter bypass state writes.

evidence.code_excerpt: if not frontmatter_warnings and not frontmatter: return at line 364
evidence.proof: No test for skill WITH warnings AND no required_tools.

impact.business_consequence: Knowledge skills with missing frontmatter bypass warning writes.

recommendation.action: Change to: if not frontmatter_warnings: return. Add test.

findings.title: Test coverage is producer-only
findings.description: All 11 tests verify write to ledger. No test verifies warnings reach users.

evidence.code_excerpt: 11 tests all write-side only. No consumer test.

impact.business_consequence: Consumer-side breakages not caught by tests.

recommendation.action: Add integration test simulating consumer read from ledger.
recommendation.code_fix: snapshot = ledger.materialize_turn(...); assert frontmatter_warnings in skill_state

findings.title: Duplicate YAML parsing logic
findings.description: _load_skill_frontmatter and _validate_skill_frontmatter parse YAML identically but use different paths.

evidence.code_excerpt: Both use split() and yaml.safe_load. No shared helper.

findings.title: Bare except: silently masks errors
findings.description: Lines 218 and 274: bare except Exception: pass silently suppresses all errors.

evidence.code_excerpt: except Exception: pass at lines 218 and 274
evidence.proof: Bare except catches all with no logging.

recommendation.action: Replace with specific exception types and debug logging.
